name: carousel
title: Carousel
description: A named Embla-powered carousel with swipe, separated Commons Button controls, visible API-backed position, localized slide names, current-slide announcements, RTL arrow flipping, vertical orientation, optional direct-navigation dots, and reduced-motion behavior. Autoplay is intentionally excluded.
useWhen: A small set of equivalent featured items must share limited page space
People benefit from swipe as an additional input while visible buttons remain available
Horizontal or vertical paging materially improves a focused browsing task
avoidWhen: All items can fit in a normal list or grid — visible content is easier to discover
Content is urgent, required, sequential, or must not be missed
Automatic advancement is desired; Commons deliberately excludes autoplay
A carousel would hide core navigation or require an in-component scroll trap

keyboard: Tab reaches previous, next, optional pagination, and interactive slide descendants in document order
Enter or Space activates native carousel control buttons
Arrow keys move to the previous or next snap and flip horizontally in RTL
The carousel is a named region and each slide is a named group with slide roledescription
A polite live region announces the current localized slide position
Reduced-motion preference makes control navigation jump without animation
accessibility.targetSize: 44px project default for every built-in control
